### Submission Checklist

- [ ] Paper PDF included in `papers/YYYY-NNN/paper.pdf`
- [ ] `metadata.json` with all required fields
- [ ] `references.bib` included
- [ ] All references DOI-verified (verification rate: __%)
- [ ] Follows PRISMA/MOOSE reporting guidelines
- [ ] Figures are publication-quality (SVG or 300dpi PNG)
- [ ] No proprietary data used — open access sources only
- [ ] Abstract under 300 words
- [ ] Full provenance documented (model, pipeline, data sources)
